channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live Updates: As Iran war expands, Trump says he must have a role in choosing the country's next leader - CBS News
item.description:

item.title: At least 13 hospitals and health facilities hit during attacks on Iran, WHO says - The Guardian
item.description:
1. At least 13 hospitals and health facilities hit during attacks on Iran, WHO says  The Guardian
  2. WHO suspends operations at Dubai emergency logistics hub  The Times of Israel
  3. WHO says it has verified 13 attacks on health sites in Iran  Reuters
  4. Statement by Dr Hanan Balkhy, WHO Regional Director at the Director-General’s Press Conference  emro.who.int
  5. 🚨🇮🇷🇱🇧 WHO reportedly confirmed: 13 attacks on healthcare facilities in Iran, killing health workers, injuring dozens. Plus 1 verified attack on a healthcare center in Lebanon. Civilians paying the price. As always. Source: Al Arabiya, WHO briefing  x.com
